rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component names, ports, directions, data types, subcomponents, and connections as the input AADL model
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
Omit clauses involving event-port activation unless the model provides an explicit data value for the event
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
